memberApp.title: Membership Application
memberApp.desc: Fill in the form below to submit your application to become a World IAC Asia member. The management board will review and respond within 7 business days.
memberApp.experiencePlaceholder: Describe your culinary experience, positions held, achievements...
memberApp.notice: Your application will be sent to the World IAC Asia Management Board for review and approval. We will contact you via the phone number or email provided.
memberApp.successDesc: The World IAC Asia Management Board will review your application and contact you within 7 business days.

presidentAsia.label: World IAC Asia
presidentAsia.title: President of World IAC Asia
presidentAsia.p1: Chef Tran Le Thanh Thien, born in 1994 in Kien Giang province, officially assumed the Presidency of World IAC Asia in 2025. He also serves as Vice President of the Global Chefs Union (GCU) and is a PhD student at UNESCO Chair. He is widely regarded as a role model for the young generation of Vietnamese chefs making their mark on the international stage.
presidentAsia.p2: Holding an MBA from Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology (HUTECH), he combines a strong business foundation with culinary passion to serve as a culinary lecturer for University CY Paris (France) at HUTECH and several major universities in Ho Chi Minh City. He is the Founder of 2D&ONE Culinary Academy.
presidentAsia.p3: As a Global Culinary Flavor Ambassador, Representative of Chefs Without Borders (CFS), and International Judge in young chefs competitions, Chef Thien is committed to connecting the Asian culinary community, elevating professional standards, and promoting Vietnamese cuisine worldwide. He is also the author of the plant-based cookbook "An Xanh Song Lanh" (Green Eating, Healthy Living).
presidentAsia.ctaDesc: Explore the World IAC Asia network map — 10 countries, 1 professional culinary community.

president.label: World IAC
president.title: About the World IAC President
president.p1: Chef Simone Falcini was born in 1972 in Empoli, Italy. He is the World President of the World Independent Association of Chefs (World IAC) and President of the Italian Chefs Association. From an early age, he developed a passion for cuisine through his family's long-standing food business in Empoli.
president.p2: He took on his first Executive Chef role in 1996, opened his own restaurant in 1998, and spent four years in Asia studying Eastern gastronomy — the foundation on which he built his Asia–Europe culinary bridge strategy within the World IAC Asia framework.
president.p3: As the Founder and Educational Director of ITCP – Istituto Italiano della Cucina e Pasticceria, he designs training programs certified to European quality standard ISO 29990:2015. He previously served as Teaching Director at Accademia Italiana Chef, a member of the National Council of the Italian Professional Chefs Association, and received the WISE Award 2016 at a ceremony in Los Angeles.
president.ctaDesc: Explore our panel of international culinary experts — the people who set and uphold the gold standard for the F&B industry across Asia.

home.heroSubtitle: Asia's leading professional culinary organization network — managing members, judges, and international culinary accreditation standards.
home.missionP1: World IAC Asia connects culinary organizations across 10 Asian countries, promoting quality standards, professional training, and outstanding contributions in the F&B industry.
home.missionP2: We provide a transparent platform for members, judges, and partners to grow together and elevate Asian culinary brands on the global stage.
home.benefit1Desc: Affirm your quality and creativity in the culinary industry.
home.benefit2Desc: Build a strong personal and business brand.
home.benefit3Desc: Attract customers and expand collaboration opportunities.
home.benefit4Desc: Elevate your leading position in the F&B industry.

members.title: Members Directory
members.subtitle: Search members by name, code, or country. Expired unpaid members are blurred with a red badge.
members.applyDesc1: World IAC Asia welcomes chefs, culinary professionals and F&B organizations across Asia who wish to become official members.
members.applyDesc2: Applications are reviewed and approved by the Management Board. Only candidates meeting World IAC standards will be accepted.
members.step1: Fill in your information and upload your CV.
members.step2: The World IAC Asia Management Board reviews within 7 business days.
members.step3: Receive the result notification via phone or email.
